lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲੇਛ ਧਾਨੁ ਲੇ ਪੂਜਹਿ ਪੁਰਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: malechh dhaan le poojeh puraan |
lines.english: Accepting bread from the Muslim rulers, they still worship the Puraanas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਲ ਵਸਤ੍ਰ ਪਹਿਰਿ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: neel vasatr pahir hoveh paravaan |
lines.english: Wearing blue robes, they seek the approval of the Muslim rulers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭਾਖਿਆ ਕਾ ਕੁਠਾ ਬਕਰਾ ਖਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: abhaakhiaa kaa kutthaa bakaraa khaanaa |
lines.english: They eat the meat of the goats, killed after the Muslim prayers are read over them,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇ ਕੈ ਚਉਕਾ ਕਢੀ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: de kai chaukaa kadtee kaar |
lines.english: They draw lines around them, plastering the ground with cow-dung.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਕੇ ਉਪਰਿ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਜਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: chauke upar kisai na jaanaa |
lines.english: but they do not allow anyone else to enter their kitchen areas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਰਿ ਆਇ ਬੈਠੇ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: aupar aae baitthe koorriaar |
lines.english: The false come and sit within them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੁ ਭਿਟੈ ਵੇ ਮਤੁ ਭਿਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: mat bhittai ve mat bhittai |
lines.english: They cry out, "Do not touch our food,

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਅੰਨੁ ਅਸਾਡਾ ਫਿਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu an asaaddaa fittai |
lines.english: Or it will be polluted!"

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak sach dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: Says Nanak, meditate on the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨਿ ਫਿਟੈ ਫੇੜ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: tan fittai ferr karen |
lines.english: But with their polluted bodies, they commit evil deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਜੂਠੈ ਚੁਲੀ ਭਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: man jootthai chulee bharen |
lines.english: With filthy minds, they try to cleanse their mouths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਚਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਾ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: such hovai taa sach paaeeai |2|
lines.english: If you are pure, you will obtain the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਵੇਖਿ ਨਦਰੀ ਹੇਠਿ ਚਲਾਇਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: chitai andar sabh ko vekh nadaree hetth chalaaeidaa |
lines.english: All are within Your mind; You see and move them under Your Glance of Grace, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape de vaddiaaeea aape hee karam karaaeidaa |
lines.english: You Yourself grant them glory, and You Yourself cause them to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੁ ਵਡਾ ਵਡ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਸਿਰੇ ਸਿਰਿ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਇਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahu vaddaa vadd medanee sire sir dhandhai laaeidaa |
lines.english: The Lord is the greatest of the great; great is His world. He enjoins all to their tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਮੰਗਨਿ ਭਿਖ ਨ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: dar mangan bhikh na paaeidaa |16|
lines.english: Even though they may beg from door to door, no one will give them charity. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਉਪਠੀ ਜੇ ਕਰੇ ਸੁਲਤਾਨਾ ਘਾਹੁ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: nadar upatthee je kare sulataanaa ghaahu karaaeidaa |
lines.english: If he should cast an angry glance, He can transform kings into blades of grass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਮੋਹਾਕਾ ਘਰੁ ਮੁਹੈ ਘਰੁ ਮੁਹਿ ਪਿਤਰੀ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: je mohaakaa ghar muhai ghar muhi pitaree dee |
lines.english: The thief robs a house, and offers the stolen goods to his ancestors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਵਸਤੁ ਸਿਞਾਣੀਐ ਪਿਤਰੀ ਚੋਰ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: agai vasat siyaaneeai pitaree chor karee |
lines.english: In the world hereafter, this is recognized, and his ancestors are considered thieves as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਢੀਅਹਿ ਹਥ ਦਲਾਲ ਕੇ ਮੁਸਫੀ ਏਹ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: vadteeeh hath dalaal ke musafee eeh karee |
lines.english: The hands of the go-between are cut off; this is the Lord's justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਗੈ ਸੋ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਿ ਖਟੇ ਘਾਲੇ ਦੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak agai so milai ji khatte ghaale dee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, in the world hereafter, that alone is received, which one gives to the needy from his own earnings and labor. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਚੇ ਏਹਿ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਬਹਨਿ ਜਿ ਪਿੰਡਾ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sooche ehi na aakheeeh behan ji pinddaa dhoe |
lines.english: They are not called pure, who sit down after merely washing their bodies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜੋਰੂ ਸਿਰਨਾਵਣੀ ਆਵੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jiau joroo siranaavanee aavai vaaro vaar |
lines.english: As a woman has her periods, month after month,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਠੇ ਜੂਠਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਵਸੈ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jootthe jootthaa mukh vasai nit nit hoe khuaar |
lines.english: so does falsehood dwell in the mouth of the false; they suffer forever, again and again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਰੇ ਪਲਾਣੇ ਪਉਣ ਵੇਗ ਹਰ ਰੰਗੀ ਹਰਮ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: ture palaane paun veg har rangee haram savaariaa |
lines.english: With saddled horses, as fast as the wind, and harems decorated in every way;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਚੇ ਸੇਈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sooche seee naanakaa jin man vasiaa soe |2|
lines.english: Only they are pure, O Nanak, within whose minds the Lord abides. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਠੇ ਮੰਡਪ ਮਾੜੀਆ ਲਾਇ ਬੈਠੇ ਕਰਿ ਪਾਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kotthe manddap maarreea laae baitthe kar paasaariaa |
lines.english: in houses and pavilions and lofty mansions, they dwell, making ostentatious shows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਫੁਰਮਾਇਸਿ ਖਾਇਆ ਵੇਖਿ ਮਹਲਤਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar furamaaeis khaaeaa vekh mahalat maran visaariaa |
lines.english: Asserting their authority, they eat, and beholding their mansions, they forget about death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਜ ਕਰਨਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵਦੇ ਹਰਿ ਬੁਝਨਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: cheej karan man bhaavade har bujhan naahee haariaa |
lines.english: They act out their minds' desires, but they do not understand the Lord, and so they are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਰੁ ਆਈ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਹਾਰਿਆ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: jar aaee joban haariaa |17|
lines.english: But old age comes, and youth is lost. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕਰਿ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਮੰਨੀਐ ਸਭ ਤੈ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: je kar sootak maneeai sabh tai sootak hoe |
lines.english: If one accepts the concept of impurity, then there is impurity everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲਾ ਪਾਣੀ ਜੀਉ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: pahilaa paanee jeeo hai jit hariaa sabh koe |
lines.english: First, there is life in the water, by which everything else is made green.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਹੇ ਅਤੈ ਲਕੜੀ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕੀੜਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gohe atai lakarree andar keerraa hoe |
lines.english: In cow-dung and wood there are worms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੇ ਦਾਣੇ ਅੰਨ ਕੇ ਜੀਆ ਬਾਝੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jete daane an ke jeea baajh na koe |
lines.english: As many as are the grains of corn, none is without life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਏਵ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਉਤਾਰੇ ਧੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sootak ev na utarai giaan utaare dhoe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, impurity cannot be removed in this way; it is washed away only by spiritual wisdom. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਤਕੁ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਰਖੀਐ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਪਵੈ ਰਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sootak kiau kar rakheeai sootak pavai rasoe |
lines.english: How can it be protected from impurity? It touches our own kitchen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਾ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਕੂੜੁ ॥
lines.translit: man kaa sootak lobh hai jihavaa sootak koorr |
lines.english: The impurity of the mind is greed, and the impurity of the tongue is falsehood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖੀ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਵੇਖਣਾ ਪਰ ਤ੍ਰਿਅ ਪਰ ਧਨ ਰੂਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: akhee sootak vekhanaa par tria par dhan roop |
lines.english: The impurity of the eyes is to gaze upon the beauty of another man's wife, and his wealth.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਨੀ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਕੰਨਿ ਪੈ ਲਾਇਤਬਾਰੀ ਖਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kanee sootak kan pai laaeitabaaree khaeh |
lines.english: The impurity of the ears is to listen to the slander of others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੰਸਾ ਆਦਮੀ ਬਧੇ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak hansaa aadamee badhe jam pur jaeh |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the mortal's soul goes, bound and gagged to the city of Death. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੋ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਗੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabho sootak bharam hai doojai lagai jaae |
lines.english: All impurity comes from doubt and attachment to duality.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maranaa hukam hai bhaanai aavai jaae |
lines.english: Birth and death are subject to the Command of the Lord's Will; through His Will we come and go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੁਝਿਆ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਸੂਤਕੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak jinaee guramukh bujhiaa tinaa sootak naeh |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs, who understand the Lord, are not stained by impurity. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਣਾ ਪੀਣਾ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਹੈ ਦਿਤੋਨੁ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸੰਬਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: khaanaa peenaa pavitru hai diton rijak sanbaeh |
lines.english: Eating and drinking are pure, since the Lord gives nourishment to all.
